title: AI-empowered perturbation proteomics for complex biological systems.
author: Qian L Sun R Aebersold R Buhlmann P Sander C Guo T
content: S-EPMC11605689 PMC11605689 AI-empowered perturbation proteomics for complex biological systems. The insufficient availability of comprehensive protein-level perturbation data is impeding the widespread adoption of systems biology. In this perspective, we introduce the rationale, essentiality
